Markwise chrome — accent decision (P2)

Option AViolet accent — a real chrome color

Toolbar · notes toggled on + primary action

Markwise

Focus ring (keyboard) — new in P2

Comment pill

Active note card · thread (no side-stripe) · resolve

Commentwrite once, review anywhere
Reviewer2h ago
Can we tighten this promise to one sentence?
Agent1h ago
Done — folded it into the opening line.

Insert pillar · current (3px) vs strengthened (4px + halo)

It ships by Q3 of next year, with the editor plugins landing first.

Option BNeutral accent — no hue, tool disappears

Toolbar · notes toggled on + primary action

Markwise

Focus ring (keyboard) — new in P2

Comment pill

Active note card · thread (no side-stripe) · resolve

Commentwrite once, review anywhere
Reviewer2h ago
Can we tighten this promise to one sentence?
Agent1h ago
Done — folded it into the opening line.

Insert pillar · current (3px) vs strengthened (4px + halo)

It ships by Q3 of next year, with the editor plugins landing first.

Side-stripe (2px border-left) is gone in both: speaker is now a leading dot + label weight. The insert pillar and the comment/replace/delete tints keep their own hues regardless of which accent wins — the accent only colors chrome (action / selected / focused).
